title: Posh Paws 37516 Love Hearts 18CM (7”) Donut Worry
features: Love Hearts soft collection are full of fun, with sentimental and cheeky messages
description: Product Description Love Hearts Dolly the Doughnut Soft Toy Gift. Dolly the Doughnut has care-free attitude and outlook on most difficult or tough situations, with her popular 'donut worry' saying - who do you know that needs to be more like Dolly, or is that you? Sprinkle a bit of happiness with this perfect treat or gift to anyone that you know who needs to be reminded to not worry and be happy. This adorable Dolly the Doughnut from Posh Paws' Swizzels Love Hearts plush gift collection measures approximately 7 inches (18 cm) in height and has been produced using the highest quality and softest fabrics. Safety Warning remove all tags and ties before giving to a child
